title: Bug fixes (4) + VIX term structure regime detection integration

bugs_found: anomaly_detector.py: score() computes NaN fill medians from inference data instead of stored training medians — single-row scoring with NaN gets filled with 0.0 instead of training median, corrupting anomaly scores
shap_explainer.py: unused Optional import; docstring promises base_value return but never includes it
options_calibrator.py: IV skew floor threshold 0.9 hardcoded while all other skew thresholds come from config
crash_timeline.py: crash_prob_3m parameter has no unit guard — callers may pass decimal (0.10) or percentage (10.0), causing 100x inflation of jump rate when percentage is passed
observation.gap_identified: VIX term structure (contango/backwardation) not integrated into regime detection or signal engine, despite being a well-documented real-time stress indicator (80%+ of time in contango; backwardation strongly predicts near-term vol spikes)

bugs_fixed: anomaly_detector.py: Store training medians during fit(), use them in score() for NaN imputation instead of computing from inference data
shap_explainer.py: Removed unused Optional import, fixed docstring to match actual return dict
options_calibrator.py: Moved hardcoded 0.9 skew floor to _SKEW_FLOOR config variable
crash_timeline.py: Added unit guard — if crash_prob_3m > 1.0, auto-convert from percentage to decimal
implementation.feature_built: VIX term structure integration: (1) get_vix_term_structure_state() classifies VIX/VIX3M ratio into severe_backwardation/backwardation/normal_contango/deep_contango with signal score; (2) Regime detector uses VIX backwardation as stress signal (Bull→Volatile override, Bear→Neutral blocked during backwardation); (3) Signal engine accepts vix_term_structure_signal as component 13; (4) New /api/analytics/vix-term-structure endpoint; (5) Wired into market router, stock router, and lab data generator

limitations: VIX term structure signal uses additive weight in composite (not in main 8-weight config) — keeps impact modest until validated with backtest
VIX3M data availability depends on yfinance — may be missing for some date ranges
Regime detector VIX backwardation thresholds (1.05, 1.15) are based on research but not tuned on historical walk-forward data
assessment.self_critique: Could have added a historical backtest validating how VIX backwardation timing correlates with actual drawdowns in the walk-forward framework. The integration is correct and well-tested but the threshold tuning is based on literature rather than empirical optimization.

next_steps: Walk-forward backtest of VIX term structure signal predictive power
Add VIX term structure display to frontend macro dashboard
Integrate VIX backwardation into crash_timeline.py as an additional risk factor
Tune backwardation thresholds on 2010-2025 historical data
Add VIX term structure to options calibrator vol_kappa logic (already partially done)
